projects.title: RxOra
projects.shortDesc: A multi-vendor medication marketplace connecting PCN-verified pharmacies with buyers across Nigeria.

details.initiative: Accessing medications in Nigeria is often fragmented — patients visit multiple pharmacies, struggle to find specific drugs, and have no way to verify whether a seller is legitimate. There is no trusted, centralized platform for medication commerce.
details.challenge: Building a marketplace for medications is fundamentally different from building one for regular goods. It requires pharmacy verification, prescription awareness, regulatory compliance, and a user experience that builds trust — not just a storefront.
details.solution: RxOra is a multi-vendor marketplace where only PCN-verified pharmacies can list medications. Buyers can browse, cart, and order with delivery, while an admin layer ensures every seller has been reviewed and approved before they can transact. For prescription-only medications, buyers are required to upload a photo of their prescription before their order can be processed.
features: Pharmacy verification layer — sellers must submit PCN license and ID before approval
Multi-vendor product listings with category and prescription filters
Prescription upload requirement for POM medications before order processing
Cart, checkout, and Paystack-powered payments
Seller dashboard for managing store locations, products, and incoming orders
Admin panel for reviewing applications, managing users, and overseeing the platform
technicalHighlights: Next.js App Router with SSR and ISR for fast, scalable product pages
Supabase for authentication, PostgreSQL database, and Row Level Security
Cloudinary for product images and sensitive document storage
Paystack webhook integration for payment confirmation and order fulfillment

projects.title: MedGuide NG
projects.shortDesc: A centralized clinical reference platform giving healthcare professionals instant access to evidence-based treatment protocols.

details.initiative: In many healthcare settings, treatment guidelines are scattered across textbooks, PDFs, and online resources. When a clinician needs to make a quick decision, searching through multiple sources wastes time and introduces inconsistency in care delivery.
details.challenge: Creating a platform that was fast to navigate, easy to update as medical recommendations evolve, and structured in a way that matched how clinicians actually think during patient care.
details.solution: A platform that centralizes treatment protocols, drug references, and step-by-step management instructions for common conditions — all searchable and organized by disease category so clinicians can find what they need instantly.
features: Searchable treatment protocols organized by disease category
Step-by-step management instructions for common conditions
Drug references linked directly to relevant guidelines
Clean clinician-facing dashboard designed for speed
technicalHighlights: Built the platform using Next.js and Tailwind CSS for a responsive and fast frontend interface
Extracted, merged, and processed treatment guideline data from multiple files using custom Python scripts
Implemented efficient sorting and search functionality to organize protocols by disease category
Delivered a clinician-facing dashboard optimized for speed and usability, with instant access to guidelines
results: Clinicians can access reliable guidelines instantly, reducing decision-making delays
Standardizes treatment approaches across teams and clinical settings
Cuts the time spent searching for protocols during active patient care

projects.title: LockedIn
projects.shortDesc: A gamified habit tracking app that builds consistency through streaks, visual progress grids, and milestone rewards.

details.initiative: Most people struggle to maintain consistent habits not because they lack motivation, but because they lack visibility. Most productivity apps fail because they track tasks, not behavior — users lose momentum because they can't see their progress or feel it building over time.
details.challenge: We needed a system that would gamify daily habit tracking, encouraging users to stay consistent while providing clear visual feedback on their progress. The app had to be intuitive, engaging, and adaptable to different user goals without overwhelming them with complexity.
details.solution: LockedIn is a habit tracking app that rewards users for completing daily tasks through a streak-based system, visually tracking progress on a monthly grid and providing milestone feedback to keep users engaged and motivated.
features: Daily task completion tracking with visual monthly grids
Gamified streak tiers: Star, Superstar, Champion, Icon
Analytics comparing current progress with previous months
Customizable goals across health, productivity, and learning
technicalHighlights: Full-stack build using Django REST Framework for backend and React for frontend
PostgreSQL for task and user data storage
Engagement-tracking algorithms to compute streaks and milestone stats
TailwindCSS for a clean, responsive UI
results: Gives users a clear visual picture of their consistency over time
Gamification encourages long-term habit formation rather than short bursts
Actionable analytics help users identify patterns and improve their routines

projects.title: Connectify
projects.shortDesc: A platform where users create a single personalized landing page to centralize and manage all their online profiles and links.

details.initiative: People with multiple online profiles — across social media, portfolios, and professional platforms — often have no single place to point others to. Managing and updating those links separately is disjointed and inefficient.
details.challenge: Building a platform that felt personal and easy to manage, with reliable authentication, profile customization, and account recovery — without making it feel like just another social tool.
details.solution: Connectify gives users a single profile where they can organize and manage all their online links, update their personal information, upload a profile image, and recover their account if they lose access.
features: User authentication and full profile management
Profile image support
Password recovery system for easy account access
Centralized dashboard for managing all links
technicalHighlights: Django backend with React frontend
PostgreSQL for secure user and link storage
Password hashing and email-based account recovery
TailwindCSS for a modern, responsive UI
results: Users manage all their links and profiles from a single platform instead of updating them separately
Streamlined account management reduces friction and saves time
Secure authentication and recovery system gives users confidence in the platform

projects.title: Urswilltastee
projects.shortDesc: A restaurant management platform built to digitize menu browsing, food ordering, and customer interaction for a client's business.

details.initiative: A local restaurant looking to grow its customer base needed a digital solution to manage menu browsing, customer orders, and interactions more efficiently than their existing manual process allowed.
details.challenge: Replacing a manual workflow with a digital one without disrupting operations. The system had to be simple enough for staff to use immediately and reliable enough for customers to trust from day one.
details.solution: A full restaurant management platform where customers browse the menu, place orders, and track their order status digitally, while staff manage everything through a simple, purpose-built admin dashboard.
features: Digital menu browsing for customers
Order placement and real-time status updates
Admin dashboard for staff to manage incoming orders
Clean, mobile-friendly interface
technicalHighlights: Django backend for order and menu management
React frontend for a responsive customer experience
PostgreSQL for order and menu data storage
TailwindCSS for clean UI design
results: Reduced order errors and improved overall speed of service
Gave customers a better experience through easy, accessible menu browsing
Streamlined staff workflow and reduced day-to-day operational friction

projects.title: FYB Flyer Generator
projects.shortDesc: A flyer generation tool built specifically for Final Year Biochemistry students to create personalized celebration flyers without design experience.

details.initiative: Every year, graduating students want to share their milestone with a professional-looking flyer but don't have access to design tools or the skills to use them. For FYBs specifically, this was a recurring, unmet need with no purpose-built solution.
details.challenge: Building something specific enough to feel personal to FYBs but flexible enough to let each user make it their own — without requiring any design knowledge or technical skill.
details.solution: A web application where FYBs can generate customized graduation flyers through a simple interface, personalize them with their own details, and download or share them instantly.
features: Customizable templates designed specifically for FYB graduations
Text editing and personal detail customization
Export flyers in multiple formats
Simple interface requiring no design experience
technicalHighlights: React frontend for dynamic template editing
Python backend for template management and export generation
TailwindCSS for a clean, responsive UI
results: Students create professional flyers in minutes with no design skills required
Eliminated the need for expensive design software for a specific community need
Delivered something personal and immediately useful to a well-defined group of users
